title: Mood synthesizer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''mood synthesizer''' was a common [[Jizz/Legends|jizz]] instrument.

==Behind the scenes==
"Mood synthesizer" may very well be a reference to the real-world [[Wikipedia:Moog Concertmate MG-1|Moog Synthesizer]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Trouble on Cloud City]]''
